claims: AC5.1: initCampaign() creates the scaffold directories and expected base files for the campaign.
AC5.2: initCampaign() splits PRDs on ## US-NNN markers into per-US files that keep the objective header and isolate each section.
AC5.3: initCampaign() with mode="fresh" recreates the PRD and removes stale split artifacts.
AC5.4: initCampaign() rejects mode="tmux" without a tmux session and leaves no scaffold behind.

execution_steps.summary: Wrote tests/node/us005-campaign-initializer.test.mjs with AC5.1 happy, boundary, and negative scaffold tests.
RED: full US-005 suite failed because src/node/init/campaign-initializer.mjs did not exist.
Created src/node/init/campaign-initializer.mjs with scaffold creation, slug normalization, and idempotent .gitignore handling.
GREEN: AC5.1 subset passed 3/3.
Wrote AC5.2 PRD-splitting tests covering valid sections, objective-header preservation, and invalid marker rejection.
RED evidence reused from the initial full-suite run before the initializer module existed.
Added line-based PRD splitting that writes plans/prd-<slug>-US-NNN.md files with the shared objective header.
GREEN: AC5.2 subset passed 3/3.
Wrote AC5.3 fresh re-init tests for PRD recreation, stale split cleanup, and missing-prior-PRD behavior.
RED evidence reused from the initial full-suite run before any initializer implementation existed.
Implemented mode="fresh" as a desk-root reset followed by scaffold regeneration.
GREEN: AC5.3 subset passed 3/3.
Wrote AC5.4 tmux prerequisite tests for agent mode, tmux mode with a session marker, and tmux mode without a session.
RED evidence reused from the initial full-suite run before the initializer module existed.
Added tmux-session gating that throws "tmux required" before any scaffold paths are created.
GREEN: AC5.4 subset passed 3/3.

execution_steps.command: node --test --test-name-pattern "US-005 AC5.1 happy|US-005 AC5.2 happy|US-005 AC5.3 happy|US-005 AC5.4 happy" tests/node/us005-campaign-initializer.test.mjs
execution_steps.summary: L3 happy subset passed 4/4.

execution_steps.summary: L3 boundary subset passed 4/4.

execution_steps.command: node --test --test-name-pattern "US-005 AC5.1 negative|US-005 AC5.2 negative|US-005 AC5.3 negative|US-005 AC5.4 negative" tests/node/us005-campaign-initializer.test.mjs

Full US-005 suite passed 12/12.
